title:
Control of sorghum shootfly atherigona soccata rondani
through trapping and bait sprays
abstract:
Field trials were undertaken to explore the possibility of
controlling sorghum shootfly, Atherigona soccata Rondani, by mass trapping of the flies in fishmeal-baited traps and by using bait sprays of fishmeal and a synthetic pyrethroid, decamethrin...
